resource.name: RIMS-SciBack
resource.description: Provisioning PUSH de identidad + roles RIMS hacia la API SCIM 2.0 que el RIMS expone en /scim/v2. Correlacion por externalId = eduPersonUniqueId (legajo@scope), NUNCA por correo. Los roles RIMS (rims-admin, cataloger) se inducen desde los AR-RIMS-* y viajan en el atributo SCIM roles[]. Borrado = soft (active=false). Fuente: docs/architecture/provisioning-midpoint-rims.md

operationalState.message: Status set to UP because resource schema was successfully fetched

operationalStateHistory.message: Status set to UP because resource schema was successfully fetched

script.code: def v = eduPersonUniqueId?.toString()?.trim(); if (v) return v.toLowerCase(); def n = focusName?.toString()?.trim(); n ? (n.toLowerCase() + '@upeu.edu.pe') : null
